name: Battle Wizard Attack
short_description: Unleash your inner spell caster in this action-packed, retro-style RPG! Choose from eight powerful magic disciplines and face monstrous hordes across sprawling maps packed with destructible chaos.
detailed_description:
About Battle Wizard Attack

Unleash the arcane power of eight legendary wizards in this action-packed pixel-art action RPG. Battle hordes of evil, master devastating spells, and leave a trail of pixelated destruction in your wake!

Non-Stop Action

  • Dive straight into the fray! No grinding through skill trees or endless dialogue.
  • Customize your wizard between missions, then focus on pure, unadulterated action!
  • Obliterate massive, destructible environments as you battle across sprawling maps.

Wield the Power of 8 Legendary Wizards

  • Storm Wizard: Command the elements with lightning and water-based spells.
  • Fire Warlock: Engulf your enemies in blazing infernos.
  • Ice Mage: Freeze foes in their tracks and conjure chilling attacks.
  • Earth Druid: Control the earth, shaping it to your will.
  • Blood Priest: Harness the power of blood magic for powerful attacks.
  • Ether Bender: Manipulate the fabric of reality with arcane spells.
  • Rainbow Channelist: Channel the power of the spectrum, unleashing beams of light.
  • Doom Witch: Curse your enemies and summon dark forces.

A World Steeped in German Folklore

  • Encounter iconic creatures and legends from German mythology.
  • Battle through enchanted forests, haunted castles, and eerie villages.
  • Discover hidden lore and unravel the secrets of a land steeped in ancient magic.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal
